FastSeg vs TotalSeg — where they disagree

Modes with DSC < 0.98 (vs official). For the worst case per mode, the 5 axial slices with the largest FastSeg-vs-official disagreement. Per slice: raw image, FastSeg overlay (red), official TotalSeg overlay (green).

FastSeg   TotalSeg (official)   overlap shows both colors

Most gaps trace to the anisotropic-resampling root cause (torch trilinear vs scipy separate-z) and thin/sparse structures — see the main validation report.
